summary: Help overlay model: renders all keyboard shortcuts in categorized sections and emits switchViewMsg{view:-1} to dismiss itself

observations.text: Both '?' and 'esc' close the help overlay — they both match keys.Help and keys.Cancel respectively, emitting switchViewMsg{view: -1} which app.go catches to set showHelp=false.

Help content is hardcoded inline in View() using sections struct literal — it pulls key/desc strings from the global keys singleton via Help() method, so it stays in sync with actual bindings automatically.
helpModel has width and height fields but View() does not use them for layout — the help content renders at natural size regardless of terminal dimensions.
